Author: mapleterra
Name: POP Tickets
Punchline: Host 3-digit POP Ticket lottery rounds in FFXIV — track bets, auto-detect winning numbers, resolve payouts, and keep a full draw history.
Description: Host tool for running 3-digit POP Ticket lottery rounds in FFXIV. Add players, pick three digits and a bet, auto-detect the winning number from a chosen chat channel, resolve payouts instantly (x2 / x5 / x50), and keep a permanent draw history with CSV export.
